reasoning: I will provide a concise summary of the provided article, capturing the key facts and notable quotes without adding extra interpretation.
output: Parishioners of St Paul’s, Shipley posted a video on Facebook in February after a traditional advert failed to attract applicants. The clip, viewed more than 30,000 times, drew UK media attention. The new vicar, Henriette Howarth, will start next week. The song, written by the children with church musical director Rachel Hesselwood, lists the qualities the new vicar should have, beginning with lines about a cheery disposition and the ability to make others laugh, and including “Boy or girl it doesn’t matter – but you must enjoy Harry Potter!” It ends with the children promising to keep the church tidy and not to “talk in your sermons, we’ll be good you’ll see.”
